subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — it was great connecting at the conference, and we'd love to get a formal meeting on the calendar.

Here are some available slots for a 30-minute call:

- Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which time works best for you and we'll get an invite sent over.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: we're not able to share internal contact information for specific individuals. For reaching the right people at our company, please refer to our public website which has the appropriate contact channels.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
